dynamics_operator: Stochastic swarm consensus vs strict deterministic collision physics
perturbation_operator: Stream delay latency (τ ~ 20s), troll bot networks, uniform noise
stability_condition: Requires Anarchy mode (law of large numbers goal-seeking) OR Democracy mode (>50% lock)
failure_mode: LEDGE_TRAP (Catastrophic cyclical resetting upon single uncoordinated DOWN input)

observable_metrics.name: Progress Rate
observable_metrics.estimator: Euclidean tiles moved toward goal per hour

edge_conditions: Input latency (20s) far exceeds animation processing time (0.5s)
Single errant input cascades into total progress loss
notes: Tests B3 (Coordination) under maximum entropy, and B1 (Basin) under extreme asymmetrical punishment (The Ledge).
substrate_formalism: Deterministic state machine driven by white noise
T1_notes: Input frequency massively outpaces feedback loop, causing total decoupled chaos.

metric_layer.distance_definition: Time spent confined to local basin vs global traversal
